domain: Tlingit/Haida bentwood box (single cedar plank with 3 kerf-grooves carved halfway through, steam-bent at the kerfs to form 4-sided box; pliable when wet, rigid when dry)
specific_mechanism: One-piece plank, pre-engraved fold points, two-state material (pliable→rigid), one true seam.
llm_application: KGSTWF: one flat weight tensor with pre-engraved kerf-fold positions. Trained flat (pliable phase); deployed folded once (rigid phase). Fold is one-time topology change, not learned per-step.
novelty_claim: µnit Scaling (2502.05967) precision-side. LLMOrbit (2601.14053) taxonomy. Symbolic Tensor Graph (2511.10480) workload. None retrieve pre-engraved-fold + train-flat + deploy-fold one-time topology change.
